file_insights.purpose: Public API barrel export for subscription module
REST API controller for subscription endpoints
Data access layer for subscription entities
TypeScript type definitions for entire module

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized index.ts exports all public APIs organized by category
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single import point for module consumers, organized exports

patterns_discovered.description: Hierarchical feature checking with plan tiers and resource limits
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible permission model supporting multiple tier levels

patterns_discovered.description: Before/After hooks for subscription lifecycle events
Module emits typed events for subscription state changes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Decoupled components can react to subscription changes

patterns_discovered.description: Five-tier subscription model (free, starter, professional, business, enterprise)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible monetization with feature segmentation per tier

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive TypeScript types with discriminated unions and type guards
patterns_discovered.benefit: Runtime validation support through Zod schemas

patterns_discovered.description: SubscriptionService encapsulates all business logic separate from HTTP concerns
patterns_discovered.benefit: Can be reused across API, CLI, background jobs, etc.
Consistent data retrieval patterns across endpoints

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Circular dependency risk between auth and subscription modules
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure dependency injection is configured correctly; consider module initialization order

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Plan tier comparison logic must be consistent
gotchas_discovered.context: Multiple places comparing tiers (service, types, schemas)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use centralized compareTiers function from subscription.schema

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Usage tracking for limits requires accurate audit trail
gotchas_discovered.context: Feature gating depends on usage data accuracy
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement transaction logging for all usage updates

gotchas_discovered.context: calculateProration utility must handle edge cases (leap years, timezone, etc.)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Comprehensive test coverage for all date scenarios

gotchas_discovered.context: gracePeriodDays setting affects when features are actually disabled
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document grace period behavior clearly; implement warning notifications

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Trial period management across plan changes
gotchas_discovered.context: Changing plans during trial affects trial end date and renewal date
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Define clear rules for trial behavior on plan changes
Use timestamp + sequential ID pattern; add database uniqueness constraint

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Feature check performance with complex rules
gotchas_discovered.context: Frequent feature checks could hit database on every API call
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement caching strategy for feature availability checks

approach_outcome.summary: Complete subscription module implementation with all core features
components_delivered: Service layer with comprehensive business logic
Complete type definitions with type guards
key_features_implemented: Multi-tier plan system (free, starter, professional, business, enterprise)
Subscription lifecycle management (create, update, cancel, reactivate)
Feature gating with plan-based access control
Hook system for extending subscription lifecycle
architectural_decisions: Comprehensive TypeScript types for IDE support

code_quality_metrics.documentation: comprehensive - detailed JSDoc on all public APIs
code_quality_metrics.type_safety: high - extensive TypeScript with type guards
code_quality_metrics.error_handling: structured - custom error types with context

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite covering plan tier comparisons, prorated billing calculations, and feature gate edge cases
recommendations.rationale: Complex business logic requires thorough testing to prevent billing and access control bugs

recommendations.recommendation: Document plan change behavior matrix (timing, prorated amounts, trial handling) in separate spec
recommendations.rationale: Complex rules need clear documentation for customer support and implementation consistency

recommendations.recommendation: Implement caching layer for feature availability checks (Redis or in-memory)
recommendations.rationale: Feature checks could be called thousands of times per request; database hits would be costly

recommendations.recommendation: Add audit logging for all subscription changes (plan changes, cancellations, billing updates)
recommendations.rationale: Essential for compliance and dispute resolution

recommendations.recommendation: Create payment provider integration layer abstraction before implementing actual payment processing
recommendations.rationale: Allows testing with mock providers; eases future provider switching

recommendations.recommendation: Add observability: metrics for plan distributions, usage trends, failed payments
recommendations.rationale: Critical for business intelligence and operational health

recommendations.recommendation: Consider batch feature checking endpoint for performance when checking multiple features
recommendations.rationale: Some use cases may need to check 5+ features; batch endpoint more efficient than multiple requests

recommendations.recommendation: Create indexes on frequently queried columns (organizationId, status, createdAt) for subscriptions table
recommendations.rationale: List operations would benefit from proper indexing

recommendations.recommendation: Consider splitting subscription.service.ts if it exceeds 500 lines (e.g., feature service, billing service)
recommendations.rationale: Maintains single responsibility principle as module grows
